title: Comment Matrix Export
description: Deterministic export aligned to the canonical 13-column Comment Resolution Matrix spreadsheet contract governed by spectrum-systems. No extra visible columns are permitted; internal metadata travels in sidecar files.

run_id.description: Identifier linking to the review run manifest.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when the export was produced.

format.description: Export format for the comment matrix contract. XLSX is the primary artifact; CSV is secondary.

comments.description: Rows aligned to the canonical 13-column Comment Resolution Matrix spreadsheet contract from spectrum-systems.

Line.description: Visible left-margin line number or range from the PDF working paper (e.g., '42', '42-45', '42, 46').

Comment Type: Editorial/Grammar, Clarifi.description: Canonical comment type. Allowed values: Editorial/Grammar, Clarification, Technical.

metadata.description: Optional export-level metadata (e.g., column order, delimiter settings). Must not appear as a visible spreadsheet column.
